radius.$description: M3 card-like container shape for the alert: md.sys.shape.corner.medium (12dp) via the material3 radius scale.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for neutral background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for neutral foreground.

border.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for neutral border.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for danger background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for danger foreground.

border.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for danger border.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for success background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for success foreground.

border.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for success border.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for info background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for info foreground.

border.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for info border.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for warning background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for warning foreground.

border.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for warning border.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for dismiss rest foreground.
Material 3 color used by the alert component for dismiss hover foreground.
Material 3 color used by the alert component for dismiss active foreground.

color.$description: Material 3 color used by the alert component for focus ring color.
